verse.name: V1
verse.lines: From the beginning, He chose me to be His son, And He had a plan that you and I are a part of; My soul reaches out for something beyond this time, And I know without a doubt that I was in His mind.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Before the world was formed, I was in His mind He did predestinate me before all time; And I know that I am His and He is mine, Before the world was formed I was in His mind.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I often wonder why He ever chose me, But by His foreknowledge He predestined me to see; I'm merely His thought expressed in my own time, And I know without a doubt I was in His mind.
